{ "name": "@tanstack/router-devtools-core", "version": "1.166.2", "description": "Modern and scalable routing for Web applications", "author": "Tanner Linsley", "license": "MIT", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/TanStack/router.git", "directory": "packages/router-devtools-core" }, "homepage": "https://tanstack.com/router", "funding": { "type": "github", "url": "https://github.com/sponsors/tannerlinsley" }, "keywords": [ "react", "location", "router", "routing", "async", "async router", "typescript" ], "type": "module", "types": "./dist/esm/index.d.ts", "main": "./dist/cjs/index.cjs", "module": "./dist/esm/index.js", "exports": { ".": { "import": { "types": "./dist/esm/index.d.ts", "default": "./dist/esm/index.js" }, "require": { "types": "./dist/cjs/index.d.cts", "default": "./dist/cjs/index.cjs" } }, "./package.json": "./package.json" }, "sideEffects": false, "files": [ "dist", "src" ], "engines": { "node": ">=20.19" }, "dependencies": { "clsx": "^2.1.1", "goober": "^2.1.16", "tiny-invariant": "^1.3.3" }, "devDependencies": { "solid-js": "^1.9.10", "vite": "*", "vite-plugin-solid": "^2.11.10" }, "peerDependencies": { "csstype": "^3.0.10", "@tanstack/router-core": "^1.166.2" }, "peerDependenciesMeta": { "csstype": { "optional": true } }, "scripts": { "clean": "rimraf ./dist && rimraf ./coverage", "test:eslint": "eslint ./src", "test:types": "pnpm run \"/^test:types:ts[0-9]{2}$/\"", "test:types:ts54": "node ../../node_modules/typescript54/lib/tsc.js", "test:types:ts55": "node ../../node_modules/typescript55/lib/tsc.js", "test:types:ts56": "node ../../node_modules/typescript56/lib/tsc.js", "test:types:ts57": "node ../../node_modules/typescript57/lib/tsc.js", "test:types:ts58": "node ../../node_modules/typescript58/lib/tsc.js", "test:types:ts59": "tsc", "test:build": "publint --strict && attw --ignore-rules no-resolution --pack .", "build": "vite build" } }
